title: Immediate Requirement Logistics Manager at Omni Logistics India

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Logistics Manager at Omni Logistics India
jsonLd.description:
Omni Logistics India invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Logistics Manager at our Pune location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Omni Logistics India:
Omni Logistics India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Omni Logistics India!
